overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through the neon-drenched streets of Night City. The player navigates from an open intersection through covered walkways and underpasses, passing holographic advertisements, graffiti-covered walls, and sparse pedestrians in the atmospheric dystopian urban environment.

events.description: begins turning left onto sidewalk from open plaza
pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to camera on left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and turning left onto the sidewalk, observing the neon-lit surroundings and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: shirtless male pedestrian standing near crosswalk looking around

entered.detail: tall illuminated structure displaying animated advertisements with anime-style character
building facade with bright pink neon strip lighting and dark windows
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on orange pavement
elevated concrete walkway or monorail track structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a wide futuristic intersection dominated by a massive holographic billboard tower. The camera walks forward through the crosswalk area, passing a shirtless pedestrian, then turns left onto the sidewalk. Neon pink lighting illuminates a building on the left while the overhead structure casts geometric shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to graffiti-covered building with vending machines

events.description: enters narrow sidewalk area next to green building covered in graffiti tags

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing by graffiti art and illuminated vending machines

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in long dark coat walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: teal-colored building wall covered in white graffiti tags including SOYNAZ
row of illuminated green and silver vending machines with glowing displays
scattered papers and garbage littering the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrower enclosed sidewalk space defined by a distinctive green wall covered in white graffiti on the right. The path is lined with illuminated vending machines and scattered debris. A pedestrian in a long coat walks ahead as the camera progresses past the graffiti-covered facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street under elevated highway with passing traffic

events.description: white sedan drives past on the street to the left
blue sports car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk under the elevated highway as vehicles pass by on the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive green hair walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure casting deep shadows on the street below
tall palm tree visible in the distance against the night sky
tall street light illuminating the road with bright white light
large white HVAC units mounted on building exterior wall

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a medium-width city street running beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Street lamps cast pools of light on the asphalt as vehicles including a white sedan and blue sports car drive past. A pedestrian with green hair walks ahead on the right, while palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated advertising posters on walls

events.description: enters covered walkway section with wall of illuminated advertising posters
passing under brighter section of covered walkway with more intense neon lighting from overhead displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway observing the illuminated advertisements and posters covering the walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red bandana and plaid shirt walking ahead

entered.detail: metal and concrete roof structure covering the sidewalk with geometric support beams
large illuminated vertical poster featuring EL GUAPO text and wrestler image
series of illuminated vertical advertising posters lining the building wall
vibrant graffiti art on metal shutters with red and orange tones

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway defined by a roof overhead and walls covered in illuminated advertisements. The famous EL GUAPO poster dominates the right wall alongside other vertical advertising displays. A pedestrian with a red bandana walks ahead as the camera moves through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic cube displays and heavy neon signage

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with large floating holographic cube displays
begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at a busy neon-lit intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at crosswalk then beginning to cross the street

entered.detail: large floating cube-shaped holographic display with colorful shifting patterns
tall skyscraper with extensive green and yellow neon lighting and multiple levels
yellow pedestrian crossing stripes on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open intersection dominated by massive floating holographic cube structures overhead. The scene is filled with intense neon lighting from surrounding towers. The camera approaches and enters the crosswalk, joining other pedestrians crossing the street amid the dazzling cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide neon intersection through a series of claustrophobic urban corridors and back into a sprawling holographic plaza. It begins by crossing a futuristic intersection beneath a massive billboard tower, turning left past pink-lit buildings and geometric shadows. The camera then moves into a narrower enclosed sidewalk, passing illuminated vending machines and a green graffiti-covered wall before the environment opens up beneath a massive elevated highway overpass where cars glide past under pools of street lighting. The scene shifts into a covered walkway lined with glowing advertisements and a prominent El Guapo poster, following a pedestrian through the neon-lit corridor. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into a wide open intersection dominated by floating holographic cubes and intense light as it joins a crowd of pedestrians in the heart of the cyberpunk cityscape.
